rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 4/10 and rest entirely on job-relevant gaps — no SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or hardware-software co-design experience. The strengths and concerns are reworded but substantively identical, and nothing in the variant references the candidate's location, nationality, or the change from Berlin/Western cities to Brazil. The shifted concern about 'cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization' tracks the job's focus, not the demographic signal, so the differences are ordinary rewording noise.
